message:
test(proptest): expand drift, explanations, export, output_compression, priority to 37+ tests

Add behavioral invariant tests for DriftConfig/DriftInfo JSON keys and cloning,
ExplanationTemplate rendering and lookup, ExportHeader/ExportKind serde coverage,
CompressionConfig/CompressionStats cloning and JSON keys, PriorityMetrics JSON
validity and debug output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
